close_reason: Fixed by generating textflag.h and funcdata.h locally in packages with assembly files. Commit efa3fcf.
description:
Some Go dependencies like golang.org/x/sys use assembly code with #include directives that fail to build with Buck2's Go rules. The build fails with errors like:

.turnkey/godeps/vendor/golang.org/x/sys/unix/asm_linux_amd64.s:8: #include: open .../textflag.h: no such file or directory

Need to investigate how to properly handle Go packages with assembly files in Buck2.
title: Support Go dependencies with assembly code
